recommendations.title: Snow Cake
recommendations.overview: A drama focused on the friendship between a high-functioning autistic woman and a man who is traumatized after a fatal car accident.

recommendations.title: Bent

recommendations.title: The Blue Caftan
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged tailor and his wife find their relationship challenged by the arrival of a handsome new apprentice.

recommendations.title: Wild Orchid
recommendations.overview: A woman lawyer becomes mesmerized by a self-made millionaire during an encounter in Rio setting off a series of erotic encounters.

recommendations.title: Hope Springs
recommendations.overview: British artist Colin Ware discovers that his fiancée, Vera, is going to marry another man. Distraught and despondent, he gets on a plane for America and ends up in the tiny town of Hope in New England. At first, Colin is depressed, but he soon finds

recommendations.title: Just a Question of Love
recommendations.overview: After his gay cousin dies from hepatitis, young Laurent, who lives with his best friend Carole, falls in love with Cedric, a plant scientist. He's afraid to inform his conservative parents that he is gay.

recommendations.title: The Honeymoon Killers

recommendations.title: 44 Inch Chest
recommendations.overview: Colin is in agony, shattered by his wife’s infidelity, so his friends kidnap the wife's lover so he can have his revenge.
